subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Aid Thy servant Mihdi through Thy pardon and forgiveness, and cause him to enter the paradise of Thy oneness, and give him to drink from the cup [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ادرک عبدک مهدی بعفوک و غفرانک و ادخله فی جنه احدیتک و اسقه کاس
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
